results.rendered_html:
udgamanīya pot. p. To be gone up or ascended.
— yaṃ A pair of bleached or washed clothes (tatsyādudgamanīyaṃ yaddhautayorvastrayoryugaṃ); dhautodgamanīyavāsinī  Dk. 42 ; gṛhītapatyudgamanīyavastrā  Ku. 7. 11  (where  Malli.  renders u˚ by dhautavastraṃ, and says yugagrahaṇaṃ tu prāyikābhiprāyaṃ &c.; see ad loc.).
